text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A lot of strong older racers are running in the
Takarazuka Kinen. Mejiro McQueen, for one.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Ikuno Dictus are running too.
They're all so mature and cool. It'll take a lot of
courage for me to join their ranks...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer's given me all the courage I need, so
I'm sure I'll be fine!
